overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a female character in a yellow dress exploring a misty, ornate traditional Asian temple interior. The character walks through a grand hall with red wooden architecture, past banquet tables and decorative elements, and ascends a red staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty temple hall with central water pool

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the right side of the hall, observing the central water feature and ornate surroundings

entered.detail: large rectangular pool with floating red petals and steam rising from the surface
traditional square wooden lantern with paper panels emitting warm light
elaborate ceiling with draped golden fabric and hanging green tassels
tall red wooden support pillars with traditional joinery details

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right side of a misty temple hall, passing wooden lanterns. A large central water pool with floating petals dominates the space, surrounded by red pillars and an ornate fabric-draped ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: banquet hall with long food display tables

events.description: moves from open hall area to narrow passage alongside banquet tables

agents.ego_description: walking past elaborate food displays on long tables, observing the banquet setup

entered.detail: lengthy dark wooden table laden with various food platters and dishes
arranged dishes including fruits and traditional cuisine on the banquet table
white folding screen painted with plum blossom branches
white ceramic vases placed at intervals along the banquet table

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a narrow passage beside a long banquet table laden with food displays and porcelain vases. A decorative folding screen with plum blossoms becomes visible on the right as the central pool recedes from view.

events.description: character turns left away from banquet table and walks toward the red staircase

agents.ego_description: turning away from the banquet table and walking toward the grand red staircase at the far end of the hall

entered.detail: grand red wooden staircase with green carved railings leading to upper level
wooden balcony with ornate railings visible above the main floor

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks toward a grand red staircase at the far end of the hall. The banquet table recedes behind as the ornate staircase and upper balcony come into view, with the central pool now visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: red carpeted staircase to upper temple level

events.description: character begins ascending the red staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the red carpeted staircase toward the upper level doorway

entered.detail: steep red carpeted stairs with golden finials on the railings
intricately carved green wooden handrails with gold accents
doorway at the top of the stairs with green curtains and golden frame

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the steep red carpeted staircase flanked by green carved railings. The lower hall falls away behind as the character approaches the upper landing doorway framed by green curtains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, ornate temple hall that transitions from a wide water-filled courtyard to an elevated upper landing. It begins by tracking the character past wooden lanterns and red pillars beside a large central pool filled with floating petals. As the character moves forward, the pool recedes and the space narrows into a passage lined with a food-laden banquet table and a decorative plum blossom folding screen. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, leaving the banquet table behind to approach a grand red staircase while the central pool reappears in the periphery. Finally, the camera ascends the steep red-carpeted stairs flanked by green carved railings, leaving the lower hall below to reach a doorway framed by green curtains.
